purpose: Pedagogical minimal version of the mycelium growth idea. 17 graph nodes, 3 OM objects. NO memory@. Surface Blue-Noise distributes spores on internal Disc; iteration produces spline segments; Assembler emits multi-segment spline; OM Sweep extrudes n-Side along it.
visual_result: Did not render on fresh load — likely LCV-rewire-on-load bug similar to scene 02. Cache was None despite valid params (Count=100, Direction Scale=10).

om_classic_generators.name: Sweep
om_classic_generators.role: extrudes n-Side along the Nodes Spline output

surfacebluenoise@.role: uniform-but-non-aliased point distribution on input surface

disc@.role: INTERNAL fallback surface (the graph samples this disc since there's no Source Object input port)

assembler@.role: multi-segment spline output (same R12 pattern as scenes 05/06/14)

group@ Memory.role: labeled metaphorically — NOT memory@; just a Group named Memory

what_is_clever: 17-node graph is the smallest hero-asset graph yet — pedagogical-minimum scale.
surfacebluenoise@ as the canonical surface-seeding primitive (vs uniform random — produces non-aliased Poisson-disk-like distribution).
Same assembler@ Points+Segments output as scenes 05/06/14 — confirms R12 universality.
Built-in disc@ primitive provides fallback surface when no Source Object is bound (vs requiring external geometry).

gotchas_documented.issue: Cache was None on fresh load. AM params had non-zero defaults but no spline emerged.
gotchas_documented.evidence: Sweep.GetCache() = None; n-Side correctly placed (rad 2, 6 sides); param sweep showed Count=100, Random Seed=123, etc.
gotchas_documented.workaround: Likely the LCV-rewire-on-load bug from scene 02. Manually open the graph and re-engage a wire to trigger evaluation.

minimal_reproducible_subgraph.name: blue_noise_seeded_spline_growth
minimal_reproducible_subgraph.purpose: Distribute spore-points on a surface with blue noise; iterate to produce spline segments; assemble multi-segment spline output. The CORE PATTERN of organic-network spline generators (mycelium, ivy, neural networks, vines).
secondary_recipes: R42_time_driven_procedural_growth — root.time as input (not memory@) — observed in this scene's root inputs but couldn't validate without working cache

comparison_vs_scene_14_v3.object_typed_input: no (uses internal disc@) vs yes (Source Object Object-typed AM port)

lessons_for_cinema4d_mcp: Bare-graph recipes are pedagogical demonstrations of core patterns; capsule recipes are artist-shipping endpoints. Library should distinguish via recipe_style tag.
surfacebluenoise@ is the canonical surface-seeding primitive worth recipe-fying.
The same R12 assembler@ Points+Segments output pattern recurs across scenes — universal Nodes-Spline output protocol.
Internal primitive nodes (disc@, cube@, etc.) provide fallback inputs when external geometry is unbound — useful pattern for self-contained demo recipes.

frames: frames/empty_default.png (cache failed to render on fresh load — LCV-rewire-on-load bug suspected)
